## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests or validation commands and listed them above.
- [ ] I stated whether this was tested on real hardware.
- [ ] I updated `README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, or other docs if the user-facing workflow changed.
- [ ] I did not intentionally edit generated output in `buildlog/` or `htmlcov/`.
